title: SMP Aesthia
description:
This modpack is a Vanilla+ styled around exploration, dungeons & more.

Girlfriend friendly modpack.
body:
🌿 Welcome to Aesthia: Our Immersive SMP Modpack Experience! Step into a carefully crafted Minecraft adventure tailored for our SMP server. Aesthia isn’t just a modpack—it’s an RPG journey rooted in exploration, dungeons, and immersive gameplay, all while keeping the soul of vanilla Minecraft alive.
🌍 The Three Dimensions & Their Transformations 🌲 The Overworld, Reimagined The Overworld is no longer a vast emptiness. Thanks to the Terralith mod, you'll uncover lush landscapes, intricate cave systems, and exciting new dungeons—all designed to enhance your adventure without straying too far from the vanilla charm. 🔥 The Nether, Intensified Descend into a fierce and rewarding Nether experience powered by Incendium. Discover dangerous dungeons and rare materials to forge powerful gear. The spirit of vanilla is kept alive, but with a thrilling twist. 🌀 The End, Transcended No longer a barren wasteland, The End is brought to life with the incredible NullScape mod. Traverse otherworldly biomes, conquer new challenges, and uncover mysterious dungeons—all while respecting the vanilla foundation.
🎯 What’s Coming & Our Vision ✨ A World with Purpose We're working on implementing a guided progression system to provide structure, encourage exploration, and highlight the best of what our curated mods offer. Our mission? To honor the brilliant work of the modding community and help players experience Minecraft in a whole new light. This is more than survival—it’s about storytelling, world-building, and making every moment unforgettable.
📦 Embedded Dependencies & Enhancements This modpack also comes fully loaded with powerful embedded mods and libraries to ensure seamless performance, quality-of-life improvements, and immersive visuals. Many of these run in the background but significantly enrich your gameplay: 🧱 Performance & Optimization Sodium / Sodium Extra / Reese's Sodium Options Lithium – faster game logic. ServerCore – better tick handling. Entity Culling / Concurrent Chunk Management Engine ModernFix / Dynamic FPS / Krypton / ImmediatelyFast spark – server performance profiler. 🎮 Gameplay Quality of Life Waystones, EasyAuth, Fast IP Ping, TAB, Nemo’s Inventory Sorting Your Items Are Safe, Tree Harvester, Replanting Crops, Bottle Your XP Sticky Enchanting Lapis, Durability Plus, Low Shield, Stack Refill Do a Barrel Roll – style meets function! Player Locator Plus, Not Enough Animations, Chat Heads Beautified Chat [Client], BetterF3, Fuji (Essentials) 🎨 Visual & Audio Enhancements Iris Shaders, with support for: BSL Shaders Complementary Shaders - Reimagined Solas Shader Bliss Shaders Sound Physics Remastered – spatial audio immersion. ETF - Entity Texture Features, Cherry Background, Capes Falling Leaves / Motschen’s Better Leaves Shulker Box Tooltip, Blue Netherite, Default HD 128x 🧩 Structural / World Enhancements Dungeons and Taverns (+ Stronghold Overhaul) Vanilla Structure Update, Ksyxis, Yggdrasil Nether Portal Spread, Nutritious Milk 🔧 Libraries & APIs Fabric API, Architectury API, Cloth Config API Balm, Collective, YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL) Text Placeholder API, Language Reload, Auth Me All dependencies are embedded and version-matched for Minecraft 1.21.5, ensuring minimal conflicts and maximum compatibility.
